title: This Is Bad... They Just Shut Down FABLE 5
summary: A YouTube video reports that Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models were shut down after three days following a US government order, raising questions about the future of public access to frontier AI systems. The commentator frames this as a pivotal moment for whether the most advanced AI models will remain available to the public or be restricted to government control.
writeup: The video reports that Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models were shut down by US government order three days after public access opened. It frames the event as a case study in frontier AI regulation, examining how governments might place the most capable systems behind regulatory walls. The central question is whether access to the strongest models will be restricted, and what that means for public availability of powerful AI.
